Bash(EDGAR_IDENTITY="sage sage@sage.com" .venv/bin/python -c "
from edgar.entity import Company
c = Company\('NVDA'\)
f = c.get_filings\(form='10-K'\).latest\(1\)
xbrl = f.xbrl\(\)
stmt = xbrl.get_statement_by_type\('IncomeStatement'\)
print\(stmt.keys\(\)\)
role = list\(stmt.keys\(\)\)[0]
s = stmt[role]
print\(type\(s\)\)
print\([m for m in dir\(s\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)

from edgar.entity import Company

print\('obj type:', type\(obj\)\)
print\('obj attrs:', [a for a in dir\(obj\) if not a.startswith\('_'\)]\)
